content:
🚀 home-gallery | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a private, self-hosted, and feature-rich web gallery for users to organize, browse, and discover their personal photo and video collections, with an emphasis on user privacy and mobile accessibility.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted • Open-source • Web gallery • Mobile-friendly • Tagging
📖 Summary: HomeGallery is a self-hosted, open-source web gallery designed for personal photo and video collections. It offers features like tagging, mobile-friendliness, and AI-powered image and face discovery to help users browse and rediscover their media archives privately.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
